faq.question: How should Bay Area homeowners apply “5 Ways to Temporarily Fix a Broken Window”?
faq.answer: Use “5 Ways to Temporarily Fix a Broken Window” as a starting point, then factor in the home's age, opening condition, exposure and budget before choosing products or scheduling work.

faq.question: When should I get professional help after reading “5 Ways to Temporarily Fix a Broken Window”?
faq.answer: Bring in a professional when the situation covered in “5 Ways to Temporarily Fix a Broken Window” involves safety, water intrusion, structural damage, uncertain measurements or a full replacement decision.
